languages.text: {n}Юноша, все время разговора держащийся позади отца, вдруг не сдерживается:{/n} "Я видел, как на операционный стол грузили безрукого! Зачем его вообще нужно лечить? Пусть утилизируют, такого сброда на корабле навалом!"

traits.locale_text: Медотсек не может обслуживать всех, вы такие не одни

languages.text: {n}The young man, who has remained behind his father throughout the conversation, suddenly cannot restrain himself:{/n} "I saw an armless man being loaded onto an operating table! Why should he be treated at all? He should be disposed of, the ship is full of trash like him!"
languages.original_text: {n}Юноша, все время разговора держащийся позади отца, вдруг не сдерживается:{/n} "Я видел, как на операционный стол грузили безрукого! Зачем его вообще нужно лечить? Пусть утилизируют, такого сброда на корабле навалом!"

{n}The young man, who has remained behind his father throughout the conversation, suddenly cannot restrain himself:{/n} "I saw an armless man being led into a treatment chamber! Why should he be treated at all? He should be disposed of, the ship is full of trash like him!"

{n}The young man, who has remained behind his father throughout the conversation, suddenly cannot restrain himself:{/n} "I saw an armless man being led into a treatment chamber! Why should he be treated at all? He should be disposed of, the ship is full of trash like him!"

languages.text: {n}会話中ずっと父親の後ろにいた青年が、突然抑えきれなくなった。{/n}「腕のない男が治療室に連れて行かれた！なぜ治療する必要があるのか？彼のようなゴミは処分すべきだ！船は彼のようなゴミでいっぱいだ！」
languages.original_text: {n}The young man, who has remained behind his father throughout the conversation, suddenly cannot restrain himself:{/n} "I saw an armless man being led into a treatment chamber! Why should he be treated at all? He should be disposed of, the ship is full of trash like him!"

languages.text: {n}Konuşma boyunca babasının arkasında duran genç adam, kendini tutamayıp aniden konuşuyor.{/n} "Kolsuz bir adamın ameliyat masasına yüklendiğini gördüm! Neden tedavi edilsin ki? Bertaraf edilmeli, gemi onun gibi çöplerle dolu!"
languages.original_text: {n}The young man, who has remained behind his father throughout the conversation, suddenly cannot restrain himself:{/n} "I saw an armless man being loaded onto an operating table! Why should he be treated at all? He should be disposed of, the ship is full of trash like him!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Konuşma boyunca babasının arkasında duran genç adam, kendini tutamayıp aniden konuşuyor.{/n} "Kolsuz bir adamın ameliyat masasına yüklendiğini gördüm! Neden tedavi edilsin ki? Bertaraf edilmeli, gemi onun gibi çöplerle dolu!"

languages.text: {n}全程立于父亲身后的年轻人突然失控：{/n}“我亲眼看见一个没有手臂的人被抬上手术台！这种人为什么还要救治？他应该被直接处理掉！整艘船挤满了像他这样的垃圾！”
languages.original_text: {n}The young man, who has remained behind his father throughout the conversation, suddenly cannot restrain himself:{/n} "I saw an armless man being loaded onto an operating table! Why should he be treated at all? He should be disposed of, the ship is full of trash like him!"

traits.locale_text: {n}全程立于父亲身后的年轻人突然失控：{/n}“我亲眼看见一个没有手臂的人被抬上手术台！这种人为什么还要救治？他应该被直接处理掉！整艘船挤满了像他这样的垃圾！”

languages.text: {n}Der junge Mann, der während der gesamten Unterhaltung hinter seinem Vater gestanden hatte, kann plötzlich mehr an sich halten:{/n} "Ich sah, wie sie einen armlosen Mann auf einen Operationstisch gelegt haben! Warum wird er überhaupt behandelt? Er sollte entsorgt werden. Das Schiff ist voll mit Abfall wie ihm!"
languages.original_text: {n}The young man, who has remained behind his father throughout the conversation, suddenly cannot restrain himself:{/n} "I saw an armless man being loaded onto an operating table! Why should he be treated at all? He should be disposed of, the ship is full of trash like him!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Der junge Mann, der während der gesamten Unterhaltung hinter seinem Vater gestanden hatte, kann plötzlich mehr an sich halten:{/n} "Ich sah, wie sie einen armlosen Mann auf einen Operationstisch gelegt haben! Warum wird er überhaupt behandelt? Er sollte entsorgt werden. Das Schiff ist voll mit Abfall wie ihm!"

languages.text: {n}Le jeune homme, qui jusque-là s'est tenu sagement derrière son père, sort subitement de ses gonds :{/n} « Pas plus tard que tout à l'heure, un manchot a été placé sur une table d’opération sous mes yeux ! À quoi bon perdre du temps avec un vulgaire estropié ? Sa place est dans la fosse commune, comme tous les misérables de son acabit qui encombrent les coursives du vaisseau ! »
languages.original_text: {n}The young man, who has remained behind his father throughout the conversation, suddenly cannot restrain himself:{/n} "I saw an armless man being loaded onto an operating table! Why should he be treated at all? He should be disposed of, the ship is full of trash like him!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Le jeune homme, qui jusque-là s'est tenu sagement derrière son père, sort subitement de ses gonds :{/n} « Pas plus tard que tout à l'heure, un manchot a été placé sur une table d’opération sous mes yeux ! À quoi bon perdre du temps avec un vulgaire estropié ? Sa place est dans la fosse commune, comme tous les misérables de son acabit qui encombrent les coursives du vaisseau ! »

languages.text: {n}El joven, que ha permanecido tras su padre durante la conversación, ya no puede contenerse más:{/n} «¡Vi que subían a un hombre sin brazos a una mesa de operaciones! ¿Por qué iba a recibir atención? Deberían desecharlo, la nave está llena de despojos similares!».
languages.original_text: {n}The young man, who has remained behind his father throughout the conversation, suddenly cannot restrain himself:{/n} "I saw an armless man being loaded onto an operating table! Why should he be treated at all? He should be disposed of, the ship is full of trash like him!"
